parsed_generation.narration: A quick, single-subject sequence showing a person posting a letter at a blue USPS mailbox.

feedback: The output stays on-topic and uses a concise shot-by-shot structure, but it lacks depth in visuals and camera variety. To improve alignment with the reference style, specify camera angles/framing for each shot (e.g., establishing wide, over-the-shoulder close-up of the letter entering the slot) and add environmental details like outdoor daylight to increase visual richness.
strengths: Maintains single-subject focus on posting a letter
fixes: Add varied camera angles and more descriptive framing for each shot
Incorporate environmental details (location, time of day) to boost realism and visual richness
